help: ICECAV overhead, cohort decay, and vehicle service life. F20 allows fixed/low (medium would inflate without evidence); F21 is hidden-internal-only because its effect vanishes by 2036; F22 retains fixed/low/medium.

parameters.label: ICECAV power overhead factor
parameters.physical_meaning: Multiplier on CAV electronic power for ICE-driven CAVs. Reflects the alternator/idle overhead of powering AV electronics from an ICE drivetrain vs direct battery power.
parameters.citation: Alternator efficiency typically <50% (MDPI Machines 2022, doi:10.3390/machines10060478). ICE thermal efficiency ~30% with turbocharger (Springer, doi:10.1007/978-981-16-1582-5_6).
parameters.why_default_free: Alternator-overhead range is small but directly visible in ICECAV emissions.
parameters.why_medium_rejected: Previous MEDIUM triangular (1.3, 1.6, 2.0) extended beyond documented alternator-overhead range and inflated 2030 W/M by 0.25 without adding evidence.

parameters.label: Pre-2024 cohort age weight
parameters.physical_meaning: Base multiplier on pre-2024 cohort power; cohort exits the fleet by year 12.
parameters.why_fixed_only: Pre-2024 cohort decays out of fleet by 2036 under retire_year default. Variance has no effect on any reported post-2036 metric. Classified hidden / fixed-only per the final-design rules.

parameters.label: Vehicle retire year
parameters.physical_meaning: Integer vehicle service life in years; controls cohort rotation and the turning-year metric. Light-duty vehicle median lifetime is ~12 years in the US (IHS Markit / S&P Global Mobility).
parameters.citation: IHS Markit (now S&P Global Mobility), Average Age of Vehicles in the US. FHWA Highway Statistics, Table MV-1.
parameters.why_default_free: Evidence-anchored service life; directly controls turning year metric.
parameters.why_high_rejected: MEDIUM triangular (8, 12, 18) already spans documented light-duty service-life range (8-20 years).
